problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure may resolve How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
